# Colorado Springs Elite HVAC

> Official licensed and insured HVAC service provider for Colorado Springs and El Paso County, Colorado.

## Business Information
- Name: Colorado Springs Elite HVAC
- Phone: (719) 304-5003
- Email: colorado_springs@thehvacshopllc.com
- Address: 1312 Valley St, Colorado Springs, CO 80915
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7AM-8PM, Sat 8AM-6PM, Sun Emergency Only, 24/7 Emergency Dispatch
- License: Active Colorado mechanical licenses, fully insured
- Certifications: NATE-certified technicians
- Permits: Pikes Peak Regional Building Department (PPRBD) permitted work

## Services
- Emergency HVAC Repair (24/7, no overtime charges)
- Furnace Repair (ignitor, blower motor, heat exchanger, flame sensor)
- AC Repair (frozen coils, refrigerant leaks, capacitor, compressor)
- Furnace Installation (Manual J sizing at altitude, PPRBD permits)
- AC Installation (central air, ductless mini-splits, heat pumps)
- Commercial HVAC (RTU service, maintenance contracts, tenant build-outs)
- HVAC Maintenance Plans (bi-annual tune-ups starting at $189/year)

## Service Areas
- Colorado Springs, CO (headquarters) — Briargate, Broadmoor, Old Colorado City, Powers Corridor, Northgate, Stetson Hills, Rockrimmon, Falcon, Cimarron Hills, Cordera
- Monument, CO — Jackson Creek, Forest Lakes, Promontory Pointe, Woodmoor, Tri-Lakes
- Fountain, CO — Countryside, Heritage, Fountain Mesa, Fort Carson corridor
- Security-Widefield, CO — Widefield Park, Security Boulevard, base-area housing
- Manitou Springs, CO — Old Town, Crystal Hills, historic district

## Pricing (approximate ranges)
- Diagnostic / Service Call: $89-$129 (waived with repair)
- Common Repairs: $185-$650
- Gas Furnace Installation (80% AFUE): $3,200-$4,800
- Gas Furnace Installation (96% AFUE): $4,800-$7,500
- Central AC Installation: $4,200-$8,500
- Ductless Mini-Split: $3,800-$14,000
- Full HVAC System: $8,000-$15,000

## Altitude Considerations
- Colorado Springs elevation: 6,035 ft
- Furnaces derate ~4% per 1,000 ft above sea level (~24% total)
- Manual J load calculations calibrated for altitude
- Chinook wind exposure and 140°F seasonal temperature swings factored into sizing

## Brands Installed
Trane, Carrier, Lennox, Rheem, Goodman, Mitsubishi (ductless)

## Website
https://elitehvaccoloradosprings.com/
